remarks: Opportunity Knocks! Bring your vision and transform this spacious 3-bedroom, 2 full bath, 1 half bath townhome into the home you've always wanted. Located in a convenient Stamford community, this property offers generous living space, a functional floor plan, and tremendous potential for renovation and customization.  The main level features comfortable living and dining areas, while the lower level offers a private entrance, providing flexible space for a family room, home office, gym, or guest area. An attached 1-car garage adds everyday convenience.  Ideally situated near shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, Metro-North, and major highways, this home offers an excellent opportunity for homeowners, investors, or anyone looking to build equity through improvements.  Sold strictly As Is. Don't miss this chance to invest in a home with great bones, a desirable layout, and an outstanding Stamford location.
